rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model's configured dependencies
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE annex expressions
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and their expressions
Avoid encoding AADL property associations as AGREE variables
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE clauses follow the pattern: assume "label": expression; guarantee "label": expression; eq name : type = expression; const name : type = value; assign output = expression;
anti_patterns: Do not reference unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in AGREE annexes
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about package or property set visibility
Implementation-level subcomponent path usage in type contracts
